ThingShape.description: MCP services to help with AI development.
ThingShape.name: VPS.Development.MCP.Management_TS

ServiceDefinition.description: Uploads a base64-encoded zip of ThingWorx entity XML into SystemRepository, extracts it, and imports the entities into the running server.
ServiceDefinition.name: ImportEntityZip

FieldDefinition.description: Base64-encoded bytes of the zip to import.
FieldDefinition.name: zipContent

FieldDefinition.description: Name to give the uploaded file, e.g. VPS.zip.
FieldDefinition.name: fileName

FieldDefinition.description: Subfolder under the SystemRepository root to upload, extract, and import into, e.g. vps.
FieldDefinition.name: folderName

ServiceDefinition.description: Calls a service on any Thing with the given params and returns a structured JSON result. Never throws; failures are reported via the returned success/error fields.
ServiceDefinition.name: ExecuteService

FieldDefinition.description: Name of the Thing to call the service on.
FieldDefinition.name: thingName

FieldDefinition.description: Name of the service to call on that Thing.
FieldDefinition.name: serviceName

FieldDefinition.description: Object of parameter name to value to pass to the target service.
FieldDefinition.name: params
